releaseNotes:
fix(auth): never crash on a bad validate response; surface the real cause; 0.1.3

- AuthRepository.runAuth now catches SerializationException (the uncaught crash
  class when a response shape mismatches) and maps it to a graceful Failure.
- HomeScreen's error now shows the actual cause (validate HTTP code / no
  connection / parse detail) instead of a generic message — lets us debug the
  post-login 'Could not load your profile' without adb.
- bump 0.1.3 (versionCode 4).
